page_sub: Practice yoga with me from anywhere — two easy ways to join.
intro: Whether you prefer a structured course with assignments and community, or the freedom to drop in whenever you want, I have an option for you.
option1_body: Register through Mesa Community College for classes that meet online and are recorded for you to revisit anytime. A two-credit introductory course covering yoga history, philosophy, postures, and breath work.
option2_body: Actual classes filmed on location with students, so you get the real experience of being in the room. Subscribe so you never miss a new class — and remember: the more you watch and comment, the bigger our community grows!
cta_body: I hope you enjoy the classes. Feel free to leave a comment, hit thumbs up, or reach out to me directly — your presence in this community means everything.
